node.html: This application was developed specifically for our department and was presented before the NBA committee. The application effectively showcased various facets of our department, including events, academic achievements, sports victories, and upcoming events.

This application delivers the latest in technology news, employing the BLOC pattern and Clean Architecture for robustness and scalability. Users can seamlessly access curated articles, stay informed, and enjoy an intuitive browsing experience.

This application was meticulously crafted with the purpose of facilitating the seamless sharing of college textbooks between senior and junior students within our institution. Its inception stemmed from the recognition of the importance of academic resources and the desire to foster a culture of knowledge exchange and collaboration among students
